formatting.noDashesNote: Never use hyphens or dashes (-) in post content. Use commas, semicolons, or rewrite the sentence instead.

heroImage.instructions: Every post must have a heroImage in PostMeta. Search Unsplash for a relevant photo, use the full CDN URL format: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-{ID}?w=1200&q=80, include the photographer name and profile URL for credit.

inlineImages.perPost: 1-3 inline images where a visual genuinely helps explain the concept
inlineImages.format: Use in JSX
inlineImages.instructions: Add inline images at natural breakpoints in the article where a chart, screenshot, or photo adds value. Always include descriptive alt text.

images.unsplashSearchTips: Search unsplash.com for the topic, pick a high-quality photo, copy the photo ID from the URL (e.g. unsplash.com/photos/abc123 -> photo ID is abc123), build the CDN URL as shown above.
